vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on /var/log Directory
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /var/log, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0755 /var/log
vulnerability.recommendation: Remediation script: find -H /var/log/ -maxdepth 0 -perm /u+s,g+ws,o+wt -type d -exec chmod u-s,g-ws,o-wt {} \;

triage_decision.reason: The remediation only changes directory permissions on /var/log, which does not affect authentication, networking, or critical boot components. Adjusting permissions is a standard STIG hardening step and is unlikely to cause lockout or service disruption.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: filesystems affected; potentially restrictive log access for applications that expect different permissions
